name: Ritual Skull
description: Notes Part of the Shaman Necromancer Set.

stats.damage: Burst 1: 190-235 (+3 for every WIS above 55) Burst 2: 170-215 Burst 3: 150-190 Burst 4: 130-190 Burst 5: 105-170 Burst 6: 85-150
stats.range: Burst 1: 0.9 tiles Burst 2: 1.4 tiles Burst 3: 1.9 tiles Burst 4: 2.4 tiles Burst 5: 2.9 tiles Burst 6: 3.4 tiles

effects: Necromancy: raise 1 Ritual Undead to fight for you. On ability Use: Summons ritual circle for 6 seconds Ritual Circle: Inflicts 225-275 Damage within 3 sqrs at the radius, scaling up to 1350-1650 Damage at the center every second Healing within 3 sqrs With Fang Necklace: The Ritual Circle gives Berserk within 3 sqrs With Soul Gem Amulet: The Ritual Circle inflicts Slowed within 3 sqrs Cooldown: 6 seconds
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
